overall.description: A stationary nighttime view of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street from the video game Cyberpunk 2077. Neon-lit skyscrapers tower above the multi-lane road as various futuristic vehicles drive through the wet streets, their headlights reflecting off the rain-slicked asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of traffic flow from sidewalk vantage point

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying a woman's face on the right building facade
long horizontal neon streetlight spanning across the road
tall glass and steel building with illuminated windows towering over the street
low concrete barrier separating the road from the sidewalk on the right
rain-soaked asphalt street reflecting neon lights and vehicle headlights

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night. Digital billboards illuminate the glass skyscrapers while moderate traffic flows along the wet asphalt. The overhead streetlight casts a bright glow on the scene as various vehicles pass through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with digital billboards

events.description: green sedan enters from the right and pulls over to the side of the road
blue sports car stops in the middle of the road to navigate around the parked green vehicle
blue sports car accelerates and exits the frame to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the traffic interaction from the fixed position

notable_agents.action: green sedan parked on the right shoulder of the road
blue sports car stopped in the middle of the road then maneuvering around the green sedan

segments.scene_description: The scene continues with a green sedan pulling over to the right side of the road, followed by a blue sports car that stops in the middle of the street to navigate around the parked vehicle. The wet road surface reflects the neon lights from the surrounding buildings as the blue car carefully maneuvers past the obstruction and accelerates away.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane downtown street with digital billboards

events.description: dark sedan enters from the left and stops abruptly in the middle of the road

agents.ego_description: observing the stationary dark car blocking the traffic lane

notable_agents.action: dark sedan stopped in the middle of the road creating a traffic obstruction

segments.scene_description: Traffic continues to flow through the downtown intersection until a dark sedan enters and stops abruptly in the middle of the road, creating a temporary obstruction. The vehicle remains stationary for an extended period as other cars pass around it, with the neon-lit cityscape providing a constant backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective of a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection where the steady flow of futuristic traffic is periodically disrupted by stalling vehicles. It begins with a wide view of glass skyscrapers and digital billboards casting vibrant neon light across the wet asphalt as cars glide through the intersection. As the traffic pattern shifts, a green sedan pulls over to the right, forcing a blue sports car to slow and carefully maneuver around it before accelerating away. The scene then continues with the rhythmic movement of downtown traffic until a dark sedan abruptly stops in the middle of the road. This final obstruction creates a static focal point in the street while other vehicles flow around it against the constant, glowing backdrop of the neon cityscape.
